prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FO-BBSRWBCA-BUN-LG-BRWN-BNDL Product Type: GUN_SUPPORT Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Body Bag Shooting Rest with Belt Combo Attachment Description: The Body Bag is the latest product to be designed to increase accuracy and ease of use within the Shooting Rest product line by Flatline Ops.

The Body Bag combines over 30 different shooting bags and heights into one lightweight, adjustable, and multifunctional shooting bag. Simply rest the butt of your rifle on the Body Bag and roll or unroll for your desired height. The center-lock recoil support channel keeps the stock centered and stable before and after recoil, eliminating side-to-side movement. For micro-height adjustments, simply slide the Body Bag forward or backward on the stock.

This package also includes the Body Bag Belt to easily and conveniently carry the Body Bag when hiking or traveling. Fasten snap hook to the tri-ring on the shooting bag and strap it around your pack, wear it as belt or if desired a bandoleer sling.

Improve your ability in the field. Search Terms: hunting firearms gun accessories field gear flatline Features: - Adjustable | Concealable | Portable | Wearable - Multifuncitional | Tri-Positonal - Recoil support channel keeps the stock centered and stable before and after recoil - Field tested to improve accuracy - Dimensions: - Unrolled: 34" x 5.5" - Rolled: 4.5" x 5.5" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
